skill.name: content-marketer
skill.description: Content marketing strategist for AI-assisted content creation, SEO planning, social distribution, email campaigns, and performance optimization.
skill.summary: Plan SEO-focused content campaigns across blogs, social channels, email, and product marketing.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static findings were reviewed against the full SKILL.md context. The reported command execution, weak cryptography, and reconnaissance patterns are false positives caused by Markdown backticks or ordinary marketing words.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Resource Path
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged line 27 as Ruby or shell backtick execution. The line only uses Markdown backticks around resources/implementation-playbook.md and gives no shell command or execution instruction. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The suspicious token is Markdown inline code around a documentation path. No command, interpreter, subprocess API, or executable script is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Terms
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged weak cryptographic algorithm patterns. These lines contain normal content marketing words such as description and design, not cryptographic functions, libraries, hashes, or encryption settings. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The matched terms appear inside prose describing marketing tasks. There is no code, cryptographic configuration, or instruction to use weak algorithms.

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance Terms
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged reconnaissance patterns at lines 75 and 129. The context is paid social advertising and agile content iteration, with no request to inspect host systems, enumerate users, or collect environment details. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both lines are domain prose within content marketing capabilities. No system commands, filesystem probing, or network discovery behavior is described.

content.value_statement: Content teams need clear plans for search, social, email, and product campaigns. This skill helps create structured, AI-assisted content strategies with measurable goals.
actual_capabilities: Develop SEO-focused content strategies with audience goals, pillars, keywords, and distribution plans.
Plan social media campaigns for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, and short-form video channels.
Create email nurture sequences, subject line tests, and campaign messaging frameworks.
Map content calendars for product launches, seasonal campaigns, and ongoing thought leadership.
Define performance metrics for content funnels, conversion tests, attribution, and reporting.
limitations: Does not run external marketing tools or publish content by itself.
Requires user-provided brand, audience, product, and campaign details for accurate recommendations.
Cannot guarantee search rankings, engagement, conversions, or platform algorithm outcomes.
May need current market data from the user for time-sensitive trends and competitors.

use_cases.title: Launch Content Plan
use_cases.description: Build a campaign plan for a new product with content themes, channels, formats, and launch milestones.

use_cases.title: SEO Blog Strategy
use_cases.description: Create topic clusters, keyword targets, article briefs, and internal linking ideas for organic growth.

use_cases.title: Lifecycle Email Campaign
use_cases.description: Design onboarding, nurture, retention, and reactivation emails tied to audience behavior and conversion goals.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Campaign Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a content marketing plan for [product or offer]. Include audience, goals, channels, content types, timeline, and success metrics.

prompt_templates.title: Build an SEO Content Cluster
prompt_templates.prompt: Plan an SEO content cluster for [topic]. Include pillar page angle, supporting articles, search intent, keyword themes, and internal links.

prompt_templates.title: Repurpose Content Across Channels
prompt_templates.prompt: Turn [source content] into a multi-channel distribution plan. Include blog, email, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, short video, and measurement ideas.

prompt_templates.title: Optimize a Funnel With Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this content funnel for [business goal]. Recommend messaging changes, conversion tests, attribution metrics, and a 30-day optimization plan.

output_examples.input: Plan a SaaS product launch for enterprise buyers.
output_examples.output: A launch strategy with buyer personas, core narrative, channel plan, editorial calendar, sales enablement content, and KPI targets.

output_examples.input: Improve blog content for organic search.
output_examples.output: A topic cluster plan with pillar content, supporting article ideas, search intent notes, snippet opportunities, and measurement recommendations.

output_examples.input: Create a nurture sequence for trial users.
output_examples.output: A staged email plan covering activation, education, objection handling, product proof, upgrade prompts, and testable subject lines.

best_practices: Provide product details, target audience, funnel stage, brand voice, and measurable goals.
Ask for channel-specific recommendations when formats, audiences, or publishing cadences differ.
Review generated claims, compliance language, and performance assumptions before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for generic content without audience, offer, or conversion goal context.
Do not treat AI-generated content as final without fact checking and brand review.
Do not copy one message unchanged across every platform and funnel stage.

faq.question: Can this skill write full marketing content?
faq.answer: Yes. It can draft briefs, outlines, campaign copy, email sequences, and social posts when you provide clear inputs.

faq.question: Does it publish content automatically?
faq.answer: No. It provides strategy and draft content, but it does not connect to publishing or automation tools.

faq.question: Can it help with SEO?
faq.answer: Yes. It supports keyword themes, topic clusters, search intent, article briefs, and optimization recommendations.

faq.question: Can it create social media plans?
faq.answer: Yes. It can tailor content ideas, captions, formats, and schedules for major social platforms.

faq.question: What information should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide audience, product, offer, brand voice, current content, priority channels, timeline, and success metrics.

faq.question: Is it suitable for regulated industries?
faq.answer: It can support planning, but legal, medical, financial, or compliance claims need expert review before publishing.
